summary: Tested Vibify backend APIs (contact, booking, newsletter, submissions, stats) and frontend landing + admin flows. 10/10 backend pytest pass. All requested frontend flows verified (nav contact dialog, hero CTA, booking dialog, contact validation, newsletter footer, admin tabs, scroll progress, 8 service cards, 6 work cards, testimonial slider switching).

issues: Hero headline words rendered as individual spans with NO whitespace separators in DOM. innerText returns 'Wemakebrandsimpossibletoignore.' which is bad for screen readers, SEO snippets, and copy-paste UX. Visually it looks correct because of mr-[0.22em] margin. Recommended fix in /app/frontend/src/components/landing/Hero.jsx around line 46-55: add a space between word spans (e.g., add ' ' between mapped spans, or use whitespace-pre on parent and include spaces in source array).

action_items: Minor a11y/SEO: Add whitespace between word spans in Hero headline so innerText reads 'We make brands impossible to ignore.' instead of concatenated.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean: uses async motor, excludes _id with projection, EmailStr validation, idempotent newsletter via find_one+insert. Note: idempotency check has a small race condition (no unique index on (type, email)) - under heavy concurrent load duplicates could occur. Recommend creating a unique partial index on submissions {type:'newsletter', email:1} or using upsert.
Stats endpoint runs 4 sequential count_documents calls; could use one aggregation pipeline. Not critical at current scale.
DB_NAME defaults to 'test_database' from .env - fine for preview but worth noting for production deploy.
Frontend Hero headline mapping breaks word boundaries in DOM (a11y/SEO).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 13 requested flows verified; 1 minor a11y observation)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth on app or /admin
seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_ prefixed contact/booking/newsletter submissions in MongoDB (visible in admin). Not auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 5 endpoints (10 cases) and is idempotent (uses uuid emails). Frontend playwright flow verified Landing + Admin. Headline uses data-testid='hero-headline' but words are split across spans with no whitespace in DOM - use partial match like 'impossible to ignore' on individual word spans or check visible text rather than innerText. Scroll progress testid is 'scroll-progress-bar' (not 'scroll-progress'). Testimonial card uses 'testimonial-card' (no 'testimonial-quote' testid).
rca of the issue: Hero headline a11y issue RCA: Hero.jsx maps over headline array rendering each word inside a <span class='inline-block ... mr-[0.22em]'>. Adjacent spans have no whitespace text node between them. Visual spacing is purely CSS margin. Fix: insert ' ' between siblings, or render words inside a flex container with gap and aria-label on the h1 containing the full sentence for screen readers.
